name: mariomarcolongo
description: AI Evaluation & Research Verification Specialist | Model Behavior Evaluation · Scientific Evidence Review · Evaluation Operations · Technical Research portfolio and CV SSOT

scripts.dev: node scripts/check-stale-strings.js && node scripts/generate-llm-dossiers.js && astro dev
scripts.build: node scripts/check-stale-strings.js && node scripts/generate-llm-dossiers.js && astro build
scripts.postbuild: node scripts/postbuild.js && node scripts/verify-dist.js && node scripts/verify-rendering.js
scripts.deploy: npm run lint && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=mariomarcolongo
scripts.pdf: node scripts/generate-cv-pdf.js && node scripts/generate-resume-pdf.js && node scripts/generate-campbell-pdf.js

author: Mario Marcolongo <me@mariomarcolongo.com>
